title: Secret Within the Sphere
overview: Airship Captain Verne Rudolph attempts to acquire the Lelia sphere, an energy course that the evil Victor Augustus uses to power his visionary city of the sky. Along with Duchess Adeline, Captain Rudolph fights many enemies along the way.
